DisableCriticals.Name: Disable criticals
DisableCriticals.Hint: Legacy setting (client-scope). Use the Luck tab to control criticals per faction (world-scope).

Luck.DistributionAllZero: All luck values are zero — distribution is uniform.
Luck.Hint: Modify dice rolls for allies and enemies. Luck uses a soft-threshold model: high values favor high results, low values favor low results — never deterministic. The critical policy controls d20 natural 1 and 20 behavior. Settings are world-scope and apply to all clients.
